description: fastrack belts are known for their rugged styling with a modern twist to suit contemporary urban wardrobes. This stylish pice can be styled in many ways with its versatile design. For a basic, pared-down look, wear this with tonal bottoms and a monochrome tee.Two tone leather upper mounted on fabricTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitFixed loops near buckleRugges stitch detail on the upperCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
